sourceTitle: 【深改进行时】《清华大学人工智能教育应用指导原则》发布
queryUsed: 清华大学 生成式人工智能 教学 政策
verificationNotes: Tsinghua University AI Education Application Guiding Principles (Nov 2025). Comprehensive framework: 5 core principles (主体责任/合规诚信/数据安全/审慎思辨/公平包容). Covers teaching, thesis, and research. Prohibits AI-generated submissions.
